@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+---
+title: Rich Rendering Demo
+category: rendering
+---
+
+# Rich Rendering Demo
+
+This document exercises math, LaTeX, and Mermaid rendering.
+
+Inline math example: $E = mc^2$ and $\alpha + \beta = \gamma$.
+
+Display math example:
+
+$$
+\sum_{k=1}^{n} k = \frac{n(n + 1)}{2}
+$$
+
+Mermaid flowchart:
+
+```mermaid
+graph TD
+  A[Open document] --> B{Has diagrams?}
+  B -->|yes| C[Render Mermaid]
+  B -->|no| D[Render markdown only]
+  C --> E[Show output]
+  D --> E
+```
+
+LaTeX fenced block:
+
+```latex
+\int_0^1 x^2\,dx = \frac{1}{3}
+```

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+---
+title: Kitchen Sink
+category: markdown
+---
+
+# Markdown Kitchen Sink
+
+## Lists and Tasks
+
+- [x] Parse frontmatter
+- [x] Render markdown body
+- [ ] Add more theme presets
+
+1. First item
+2. Second item
+3. Third item
+
+## Table
+
+| Feature | Status |
+| --- | --- |
+| Headings | Complete |
+| Links | Complete |
+| Rich renderers | In progress |
+
+## Code
+
+```swift
+struct Point {
+    let x: Double
+    let y: Double
+}
+```
+
+## Quote
+
+> Simplicity is prerequisite for reliability.
